name: python3-pyqt6
title: python3-pyqt6
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6
PyQt6 exposes the Qt 6 API to Python.
This package contains the following modules:
* QtCore
* QtDBus
* QtGui
* QtNetwork
* QtOpenGL
* QtOpenGLWidgets
* QtPrintSupport
* QtSql
* QtTest
* QtWidgets
* QtXml
* uic
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6 because Python bindings for Qt 6.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
